title: Why ORDI Went Up Yesterday
summary: ORDI was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, posting a sharp gain with elevated market activity.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers.
Trading activity stayed active as traders rotated into high-momentum names.
Renewed attention around the broader Bitcoin ecosystem may have supported the move.
about: ORDI is associated with the Bitcoin Ordinals ecosystem and is often watched during narrative-driven rotations.
reportIntro: ORDI stood out as one of yesterday's strongest movers, supported by price momentum and active trading.
